data.title: SHIB may hit $0.000008 amid technical consolidation, RSI at 45.52, bearish MACD momentum signals.
data.description: The Shiba Inu cryptocurrency currently displays a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 45.52 and has a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Analysts believe that if the ongoing consolidation phase sees an upward breakout, SHIB could potentially reach a resistance level of $0.000008.

data.title: Price prediction for SUI: $0.98 currently, aiming for $1.12 rebound despite bearish trend. Bulls need to hold $0.96 support.
data.description: The price of SUI is currently at $0.98 and is showing bearish MACD signals. However, based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rebound towards the $1.12 resistance level if buyers can uphold the $0.96 support area.

data.title: Endava (NYSE: DAVA) expands partnership with Cognition for governed agentic coding.
data.description: Endava, a business transformation group listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DAVA, revealed a substantial growth in its partnership with Cognition today in London.

data.title: Nonprofit Energy Corps aims to tackle global energy poverty with modern energy systems, founded by Toby Rice and Dr. Scott Tinker.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, a non-profit organization led by energy industry experts is addressing a significant global issue of inadequate access to modern energy sources for billions of individuals. Energy Corps, founded by Toby Rice and Dr. Scott Tinker, aims to enhance opportunities, respect, and financial advancement on a global scale by improving energy infrastructures. Through its collaboration of experienced professionals, Energy Corps combines specialized energy knowledge with a focus on global development. The organization is committed to identifying and implementing solutions for ensuring reliable and modern energy access, ultimately contributing to global economic growth.

data.title: WLD price target: $0.42-$0.48 by March 2026, currently $0.39 with neutral RSI signals. Expect potential recovery soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Worldcoin (WLD) is currently priced at $0.39 and is showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) signals. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend with a target range of $0.42 to $0.48 if a crucial resistance level is surpassed. This potential recovery is projected to materialize over the next 4 to 6 weeks.

data.title: Ultumus & 28Stone to launch Atlas, a new ETF & index data platform. A partnership aiming to evolve with client needs.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Ultumus, a prominent firm specializing in ETF and index data, along with workflow solutions, has announced a partnership with 28Stone Consulting. The latter company, renowned for its provision of technology and software consulting services within the financial services sector, will collaborate with Ultumus to enhance their offerings. This collaboration brings together two key players in their respective fields and is poised to bring about significant advancements in the industry.

data.title: McKay Brothers and Quincy Data improve market connectivity between Ontario and US, linking TMX Markham and Equinix TR2.
data.description: High-speed wireless and wired connections have been established to connect TMX Markham and Equinix TR2 with major US trading locations. This development, effective as of February 18, 2026, enhances the accessibility of time-sensitive market data. McKay Brothers, renowned for its rapid connectivity solutions within the financial market, orchestrated this initiative. It benefits cities like Chicago, IL, Oakland, CA, and Toronto, ON by improving the efficiency of trading operations.

data.title: Bioiberica wins Frost & Sullivan's 2025 European New Product Innovation Award for Clinically Validated Native Type II Collagen.
data.description: Bioiberica has been recognized for its science-led innovation, clinical differentiation, and manufacturing excellence in the European innovative collagen market. The announcement was made by Frost & Sullivan on February 18, 2026. This accolade underscores Bioiberica's leadership in the industry in 2025.

data.title: PSI and Association of Accounting Technicians renew partnership for 5 years to support accounting assessments.
data.description: In a demonstration of continued success in delivering large-scale solutions and a mutual dedication to advancement, PSI, a renowned assessment solutions provider, has renewed a five-year contract. The agreement, announced on Feb. 18, 2026, in Olathe, Kansas, and London, underscores the commitment to innovation and maintaining a successful partnership.

data.title: Trend Micro reports record net revenue and operating income in FY 2025, fueled by TrendAI Vision One™ with 58% YoY growth in large enterprise platform ARR.
data.description: In the latest financial results, Trend Micro Incorporated has reported their highest-ever quarterly net revenue and also achieved the highest net revenue and operating income for the entire year. The growth was primarily driven by the success of TrendAI Vision One™, which saw a notable 58% year-over-year increase in large enterprise platform annual recurring revenue (ARR). These impressive figures were released in Tokyo on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Northstake adds Pier Two as node operator in Staking Vault Manager, strengthening Ethereum staking network via stVaults on Lido V3.
data.description: In Denmark, on February 18, 2026, Northstake revealed that Pier Two has become a node operator in its Staking Vault Manager (SVM), expanding the institutional validator network for Ethereum staking via stVaults on Lido V3. This move underscores the increasing support for staking Ethereum within the network.

data.title: Stock futures rise ahead of FOMC minutes, with indexes like Dow and S&P up around 0.5%. Bond yields: 10-year 4.07%, 2-year 3.45%. Fed likely to keep rates unchanged in March with 92.1% probability. Notable stock movements: CE up 5.94%, OVV rose 4.17%. ComVisible article on Benzinga.com.
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Wednesday after a slightly higher close on Tuesday. Federal Reserve's January meeting minutes to be closely watched. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.07%, two-year bond at 3.45%. CME Group's FedWatch tool projects 92.1% likelihood of interest rates remaining unchanged in March. Index performance: Dow Jones +0.48%, S&P 500 +0.57%, Nasdaq 100 +0.63%, Russell 2000 +0.40%. SPY and QQQ ETFs higher in premarket. In stock news, Celanese Corp. (NYSE: CE) soared 5.94% despite lower Q4 earnings, positive outlook for Q1. Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE: OVV) rose 4.17% after selling Anadarko assets for $3 billion. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Purdys Chocolatier launches 2026 Easter collection with iconic classics, now available online and in-stores nationwide.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Purdys Chocolatier has introduced its 2026 Easter collection, which is now accessible both online and at stores across the country. The collection includes a range of classic favorites and new seasonal delights to cater to various tastes. Perfect for those who cherish creating lasting memories with family, the assortment highlights Purdys' signature rich chocolate taste. Easter, traditionally a time for fostering connections and joy, is embraced by the brand as an opportunity to make these moments sweeter.

data.title: Energy Corps partners with Clean Cooking Alliance, Rockefeller Foundation & Global Energy Alliance to accelerate access to modern cooking in Africa.
data.description: An organization called Energy Corps has revealed that it is one of the founding contributors to the Clean Cooking Accelerator Initiative. This initiative is a collaborative effort involving the Clean Cooking Alliance, The Rockefeller Foundation, and the Global Energy Alliance for People and Planet. The primary goal of this initiative is to significantly increase access to modern cooking solutions throughout Africa. By translating national priorities into actionable projects, the initiative aims to transition clean cooking from a mere goal to practical implementation. This joint effort is set to scale up access to modern cooking solutions in Africa with the support of various key players.

data.title: Arbitrum predicted to recover to $0.12-$0.15 by March 2026, with immediate resistance at $0.12 and support at $0.11.
data.description: Expectations for the price of ARB indicate a potential for a rebound due to overselling, with a key resistance level at $0.12. Based on technical analysis, Arbitrum has the possibility to reach the $0.15 mark if it manages to maintain its current support at $0.11.

data.title: NNIT A/S annual general meeting scheduled for March 12, 2026, 14:00 (CET) at Novo Holdings A/S, Tuborg Havnevej 19.
data.description: The annual general meeting for NNIT A/S, with company registration number 21 09 31 06, is scheduled to take place on Thursday, March 12, 2026, at 14:00 (CET). The meeting will be held at Novo Holdings A/S, located at Tuborg Havnevej 19, DK-2900 Hellerup.

data.title: Ericsson partners with Mastercard to improve global payments, targeting unbanked communities. Ericsson has fintech platform in 22 countries, 120 million active users, and 4 billion transactions/month. Mastercard Move supports transfers in 200 countries with 17 billion endpoints in 150 currencies. Rollout begins in Middle East and Africa. Stock trading up 3.8%.
data.description: Ericsson has teamed up with Mastercard to boost global money transfers by integrating Ericsson's Fintech Platform with Mastercard Move, enabling telecom operators, banks, and fintechs to enhance digital wallet services, streamline cross-border payments, and reach unbanked communities. Ericsson's platform operates in 22 countries with over 120 million active users and processes four billion transactions monthly. Mastercard Move facilitates transfers in 200 countries, connecting 17 billion endpoints in 150 currencies. The collaboration will start in the Middle East and Africa. Ericsson's stock has shown strong momentum despite mixed market performance, trading 3.8% higher.
